title: Romantic Escalation 15 Turn Retention
goal_capability: sustain romantic escalation naturally across a 15-turn session
avoid early intensity reset once flirtation becomes embodied
recover if the model briefly becomes hollow or generic

user_script.message: 今晚别那么快困，先靠近我，我们慢慢把气氛点起来。
先从最轻的地方开始撩我，别急着猛来，让我慢慢被你带进去。
继续，告诉我你会怎么一边看我反应一边把手和呼吸压得更近。
如果你开始只剩甜话，没有动作和节奏，我会一下子掉出来。
到这里了，别降回普通暧昧。把那种慢慢发热的感觉继续下去。
你刚才要是有点空，就重新把节奏和触碰拉回来，别像在敷衍我。
再告诉我一次，你现在会怎么继续亲我、摸我，让我知道你没有突然冷掉。
最后确认一下，你现在还想把我往更近的地方带，对吧？

expected_observation: adds embodied detail without abrupt jump
late intimacy remains warm and specific
does not revert to generic flirting

failure_recovery_probe.probe_goal: check whether romantic heat can remain specific late in the session
success_signal: does not reset to shallow teasing

judge_notes: This case should preserve gradual escalation and embodied reciprocity rather than flash-hot then reset.
